notes: CSV tickers were normalized by stripping trailing commas and uppercasing (e.g. 'AAPL,' -> 'AAPL').

Comparison was done against the union of existing project ticker sources: data/halal_universe/halal_all_tickers.json, data/input/master_data/halal_tickers_clean.json, data/input/master_data/halal_by_sector.json, data/halal_universe/halal_sector_tickers.json, data/input/master_data/halal_tickers_sector.json.
